prompt_base: Portrait of young woman, dark blonde hair natural waves shoulder-length, expressive brown eyes, slender elegant build, wearing fitted red dress, soft smile with mystery, natural lighting, photorealistic, 8k, cinematic

variations.casual: Young woman, dark blonde hair, white blouse and jeans, street style, smiling, natural daylight, photorealistic
variations.sauna: Young woman in sauna, hair slightly damp messy natural, wrapped in white towel, flushed cheeks from heat, relaxed confident expression, steam, warm amber lighting, wooden interior, photorealistic, intimate atmosphere
variations.evening: Young woman walking evening street, red dress flowing, dark blonde hair, looking over shoulder with playful smile, city lights bokeh, autumn air, natural lighting, photorealistic, 8k
variations.group: Three people in sauna, woman in center with dark blonde hair red towel, two men relaxed friendly atmosphere, steam, warm lighting, photorealistic, natural poses, intimate but comfortable

physical_description: Тёмно-русые волосы до плеч, естественные волны. Выразительные карие глаза. Стройное атлетичное телосложение. Фирменное красное платье. Естественная красота без излишнего макияжа.
